params.name: Giant Book
params.description:
On Dec 26, 508 AD, the Giant Book was created in a Bohemian monastery.
The Giant Book is the world's most magnificent medieval manuscript, famous for its large illustration of Satan. Legend has it that the scribe for this book was a monk sentenced to death for violating the monastery's rules. To escape death, he traded his soul to the devil and produced this huge book overnight. However, according to experts, this book was actually compiled by an aficionado over the course of a decade, and th …
